BomItem.description: Push button switch, generic, two pins
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x20, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Four pin crystal, GND on pins 2 and 4
128Mbit / 16MiB Serial Flash Memory, Standard/Dual/Quad SPI, 2.7-3.6V, SOIC-8
250mA Low Quiscent Current LDO, 3.3V output, SOT-23
